latest.title: Coral reefs are cities built by tiny animals

latest.title: Forests make cooler air under the canopy
latest.script_key: forests can cool the air below them watch the shade and mist because leaves block direct sun and release water vapor that combination can make the forest floor feel like a different climate the canopy is a cooling machine not just cover which forest layer next

latest.title: Rainbow at sea shows how light bends in cold air
latest.script_key: rainbow stretched across the ocean like a glowing highway no storms in sight that s because cold air over warm water bent the light twice once up and once down that s why you get a rainbow that s really a floating mirage makes you wonder how many more are hiding right now

latest.title: Lightning makes air explode into thunder
latest.script_key: lightning paints the sky watch that bolt split the air in half it s actually 50 000 degrees hotter than the sun s surface that s why it glows white you see that flicker that s the lightning cooling and heating the air in a blink so why does it look so smooth because your eyes can t catch the 40 individual strokes inside one flash

latest.title: Rivers sort mud and sand along each bank
latest.script_key: rivers sort sediment while they bend watch the edge of the flow because slower water drops heavier material while faster water keeps cutting that sorting is how a quiet bend slowly redraws the map which river edge should we compare next
